about.title: About REDI
about.missionText: Roma Entrepreneurship Development Initiative is an ecosystem builder focusing on developing tools to increase vulnerable communities' economic empowerment. We initially built a non-profit in Romania (2016) and set up a financial institution in Luxembourg.
about.visionText: A Europe where Roma entrepreneurs are recognized as agents of economic change, contributing to community development and fighting stereotypes through successful businesses.

impact.title: Our Impact
impact.subtitle: Four pillars driving economic empowerment for Roma communities across Europe.
